memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, TSharedPtr< AccelByte::FApiClient, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > const &InApiClient=nullptr)
memberdef.name: Statistic

memberdef.argsstring: (Credentials const &InCredentialsRef, Settings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef, FAccelBytePlatformPtr const &InAccelBytePlatform)
memberdef.name: Statistic

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &StatCodes, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemOperationResult > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: CreateUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Create a stat item.

parameterdescription.para: Specify statCodes for stat items to get from this method
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemOperationResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteStatisticSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteStatisticSortBy::UPDATED_AT_ASC)
memberdef.name: GetAllUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Get all this user stat items.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.
Page size, default value is 20.
Page number, default value is 0.
The container to store sortby.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &StatCodes, TArray< FString > const &Tags, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteStatisticSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteStatisticSortBy::UPDATED_AT_ASC)
memberdef.name: GetUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Get this user stat items by specifying statCodes and tags to get from. Returned stat items will only contain stat items specified by statCodes and tags (inclusive).

parameterdescription.para: Specify statCodes for stat items to get from this method
Specify tags for for stat items to get from this method
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Thre result is an FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult
This will be called when the operation failed.
Page size, default value is 20.
Page number, default value is 0.
The container to store sortby.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &UserId, TArray< FString > const &StatCodes, TArray< FString > const &Tags, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, EAccelByteStatisticSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteStatisticSortBy::UPDATED_AT_ASC)
memberdef.name: GetUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Get user's specified stat items and specifying statCodes and tags to get from. Returned stat items will only contain stat items specified by statCodes and tags (inclusive).

parameterdescription.para: The Id of a user that will be given his stat items
Specify statCodes for stat items to get from this method
Specify tags for for stat items to get from this method
This will be called when the operation succeeded. Thre result is an FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult
This will be called when the operation failed.
Page size, default value is 20.
Page number, default value is 0.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemInc > const &Data, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemOperationResult > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: IncrementUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Increment this user stat items.

parameterdescription.para: array consist of increased value and stat code.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsBulkStatItemOperationResult.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &StatCodes, TArray< FString > const &Tags, FString const &AdditionalKey, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsFetchUser > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ListUserStatItems

briefdescription.para: Public list all statItems of user. NOTE: If stat code does not exist, will ignore this stat code. If stat item does not exist, will return default value.

parameterdescription.para: StatCodes.
This is the Tag array that will be stored in the slot.
This is the AdditionalKey that will be stored in the slot.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsFetchUser.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &AdditionalKey, TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemWithStatCode > const &BulkUpdateUserStatItems, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkUpdateUserStatItemsValue

briefdescription.para: Public bulk update user's statitems value for given namespace and user with specific update strategy.

parameterdescription.para: This is the AdditionalKey that will be stored in the slot.
This is the BulkUpdateUserStatItem array that will be stored in the slot.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is an array of FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &StatCode, FString const &AdditionalKey, FAccelByteModelsPublicUpdateUserStatItem const &UpdateUserStatItem, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemValueResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: UpdateUserStatItemsValue

briefdescription.para: Public update user's statitem value for a given namespace and user with a certain update strategy.

parameterdescription.para: StatCode.
This is the AdditionalKey that will be stored in the slot.
This is the UpdateUserStatItem that will be stored in the slot.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemValueResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &StatCode, TArray< FString > const &UserIds, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsStatItemValueResponse > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: BulkFetchStatItemsValue

briefdescription.para: Public bulk fetch multiple user's statitem value for a given namespace and statCode.

parameterdescription.para: StatCode.
List of UserIds.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is TArray<FAccelByteModelsStatItemValueResponse>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &StatCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemValueResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ResetUserStatItemValue

briefdescription.para: Reset user's statitem value for a given namespace and user. User's statitem value will be reset to the default value defined in the statistic configuration.

parameterdescription.para: StatCode.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemValueResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &StatCode, THandler< FAccelByteModelsGlobalStatItemValueResponse > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetGlobalStatItemsByStatCode

briefdescription.para: Get global stat items by specifying statCodes.

parameterdescription.para: The StatCode of the global stat items
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsGlobalStatItemValueResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (THandler< FAccelByteModelsGlobalStatItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, TArray< FString > const &StatCodes={}, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: ListGlobalStatItems

briefdescription.para: List global stat items.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsGlobalStatItemValueResponse.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &CycleId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserStatCycleItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, TArray< FString > const &StatCodes={})
memberdef.name: GetUserStatCycleItems

briefdescription.para: Get current user stat items within the cycle.

parameterdescription.para: the CycleId where the stat items belong to
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserStatCycleItemPagingSlicedResult
This will be called when the operation failed
Page size, default value is 20.
Page number, default value is 0.
Optional. the StatCode of the user stat item. Determine which stat code to get with the cycle id.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &CycleId, FString const &TargetUserId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserStatCycleItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0, TArray< FString > const &StatCodes={})
memberdef.name: GetUserStatCycleItems

briefdescription.para: Get current user stat items within the cycle.

parameterdescription.para: the CycleId where the stat items belong to
the user Id to be queried
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserStatCycleItemPagingSlicedResult
This will be called when the operation failed
Page size, default value is 20.
Page number, default value is 0.
Optional. the StatCode of the user stat item. Determine which stat code to get with the cycle id.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &CycleId, THandler< FAccelByteModelsStatCycleConfig > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetStatCycleConfig

briefdescription.para: Get Statistic Cycle Config.

parameterdescription.para: The CycleId of the config
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsStatCycleConfig
This will be called when the operation failed

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (EAccelByteCycle CycleType, THandler< FAccelByteModelsStatCycleConfigPagingResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetListStatCycleConfigs

briefdescription.para: Get List of Statistic Cycle Config.

parameterdescription.para: This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsStatCycleConfig
This will be called when the operation failed
Page size, default value is 20.
Page number, default value is 0

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FAccelByteModelsStatGetListStatCycleQueryRequest OptionalParams, THandler< FAccelByteModelsStatCycleConfigPagingResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetListStatCycleConfigs

briefdescription.para: Get List of Statistic Cycle Config.

parameterdescription.para: Optional parameter to do the query
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsStatCycleConfig
This will be called when the operation failed
Page size, default value is 20.
Page number, default value is 0

memberdef.name: GetMyStatItems

briefdescription.para: Get user's own statistic item.

parameterdescription.para: Array of statistic codes to be retrieved
Array of tags which the statistic items to be retrieved have
Thil will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserStatItemPagingSlicedResult
This will be called when the operation failed
Page size, default value is 20
Page number, default value is 0

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (TArray< FString > const &StatCodes, TArray< FString > const &Tags, FString const &AdditionalKey, THandler< TArray< FAccelByteModelsFetchUser > > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError)
memberdef.name: GetMyStatItemValues

briefdescription.para: Get user's own statistic value.

parameterdescription.para: Array of statistic codes for statistic value to be retrieved
Array of tags that statistic item to be retrieved has
Additional key
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is TArray<FAccelByteModelsFetchUser>
This will be called when the operation failed

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &CycleId, TArray< FString > const &StatCodes, THandler< FAccelByteModelsUserStatCycleItemPagingSlicedResult > const &OnSuccess, FErrorHandler const &OnError, EAccelByteStatisticSortBy SortBy=EAccelByteStatisticSortBy::NONE, int32 Limit=20, int32 Offset=0)
memberdef.name: GetMyStatCycleItems

briefdescription.para: Get user's own statistic cycle item.

parameterdescription.para: The cycle id to which the stat item belong
Array of statistic codes for statistic cycle item to be retrieved
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is FAccelByteModelsUserStatCycleItemPagingSlicedResult
This will be called when the operation failed
Page size, default value is 20
Page number, default value is 0

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: BulkResetMultipleUserStatItemsValue

briefdescription.para: Bulk reset multiple user's statitems value. User's statitem value will be reset to the default value defined in the statistic configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Array of UserId and StatCode.
This will be called when the operation succeeded. The result is TArray<FAccelByteModelsUpdateUserStatItemsResponse>.
This will be called when the operation failed.

simplesect.para: AccelByteTask object to track and cancel the ongoing API operation.

memberdef.name: Statistic

briefdescription.para: Statistic API to manage user's in-game profiles's statistic.
